Imports

../network/http/webserver, config, paths, request, response, router, ../support/uuid

Types

AppConfigDefect = object of CatchableError
Application = ptr ApplicationObject
Alias for the application object pointer 
ApplicationAssetsHandler = proc (req: var Request; res: var Response;
                                 hasFoundResource: var bool) {.closure.}
ApplicationThreadCallback = proc (app: ptr ApplicationObject) {.closure.}
JsonString = string
Services = object

Vars

App: ptr ApplicationObject
appInitialized = false

Consts

SafeThreadVarSeq = r"WithThreadCallbackStmt"
A macro cache sequence that stores thread-safe initializations that need to be executed in the context of the application thread. This is used to ensure that certain operations that require access to the application instance or its resources are performed in a thread-safe manner.

Procs

proc appInstance(): Application {....raises: [Exception], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Returns the singleton application instance

    tags: [], forbids: [].}

    forbids: [].}

Get port number

Get ApplicationObject UUID 
proc info(str: string; indentSize = 0) {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
proc initApplication() {....raises: [Exception], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Initialize the application and returns the singleton instance 
proc loadEventListeners(): NimNode {.compileTime, ...raises: [OSError],
                                     tags: [ReadDirEffect], forbids: [].}
proc paths(app: Application): ApplicationPaths {....raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
Returns the application paths

Macros

macro init(appInstance; skipLocalConfig: static bool = false;
           initBody: untyped = nil)
Initializes Supranim application instance. This macro is responsible for setting up the application, loading configurations, initializing services, and preparing the app to handle incoming requests. The initBody parameter allows injection of custom initialization code during the application setup process. 
macro injectSafeThreadCallbacks()
Expands the registered thread callbacks into actual procedure calls that will be executed in the application thread context. 
macro withThreadCallback(appInstance, callback: untyped)
Registers a callback to be executed in the context of the application thread. This is useful for performing thread-safe operations that require access to the application instance or its resources.

Templates

template cli(app: Application; cliCommands) {.dirty.}
Injects CLI commands into the application using Kapsis command framework 
template initHttpRouter()
template initStartCommand(v: Values; createDirs = true)
Kapsis init command handler 
template services(app: Application; servicesStmt) {.inject.}
template withAssetsHandler(app: Application; handler: ApplicationAssetsHandler)
Inject a custom assets handler into the application. This allows you to define custom logic for serving static assets (CSS, JS, images, etc.) instead of using the default static file serving from the assets/ directory

Exports

init, getInstallationPath, consolePath, cachePath, runtimeConfigPath, eventsPath, pluginsPath, middlewarePath, basePath, configPath, modelPath, controllerPath, storagePath, rootPath, ApplicationPaths, p, migrationPath, logsPath, servicePath, resolve, databasePath, supranimServer, registerCallback, unregisterCallback
